mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations WHERE user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS CHAR) AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_executions, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS successful_executions, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failed_executions, COALESCE(AVG(duration_ms), 0) AS avg_response_time FROM workflow_execution WHERE user_id = #{userId}
